servinfo.title: Maintenance Schedule under Normal Driving Conditions (for Mexico)

item.ptxt: The intervals should be determined based on odometer readings or months, whichever comes first.
The following table shows the service schedule up to 250,000 km (150,000 miles). Beyond 250,000 km (150,000 miles), perform the same maintenance services at the same intervals shown in the table.

The U.S. Environmental Protection Agency or the California Air Resources Board has determined that the failure to perform recommended maintenance items, indicated by *(asterisk), will not nullify the emission warranty or limit recall liability prior to the completion of the vehicle’s useful life. Suzuki, however, urges that all recommended maintenance services be performed at the indicated intervals and the maintenance operation recorded.
This table shows the typical maintenance schedule.

The actual maintenance schedule, however, varies depending on vehicle specifications, so the typical maintenance schedule may not be applicable to some models. Therefore, for the maintenance schedule that is specifically applicable to the vehicle being serviced, follow the relevant instructions in the “Periodic Maintenance Schedule” under “INSPECTION AND MAINTENANCE” section of the Owner’s Manual.

entry.ptxt:
Engine oil and engine oil filter (R:
)

Cooling system hoses and connections (leakage, damage) (I:
)
First time only: Replace at 150,000 km (90,000 miles) or 90 months
Second time and after: Replace every 75,000 km (45,000 miles) or 45 months
Replace every 250,000 km (150,000 miles) or 180 months

item.ptxt: R: Replace or change
I: Inspect, clean, adjust, lubricate or replace as necessary
*1: If SUZUKI super long life coolant (coolant color: Blue) is replaced with the other coolant, follow schedule for SUZUKI long life coolant (coolant color: Green).
The maintenance services with *(asterisk) are recommended maintenance items. (After 250,000 km (150,000 miles), they are mandatory maintenance items.)
For specified spark plug, refer to Spark Plug Inspection .

entry.ptxt:
Brake discs and pads (thickness, wear, damage) (I:
)

Brake drums and shoes (wear, damage) (if equipped) (I:
)

Brake hoses and pipes (leakage, damage, clamp) (I:
)

Parking brake lever and cable (damage, stroke, operation) (I:
)

Steering wheel movement (tightness, damage, breakage, rattle) (I:
)

item.ptxt: R: Replace or change
I: Inspect, clean, adjust, lubricate or replace as necessary

entry.ptxt:
Engine oil and engine oil filter (R:
)

Cooling system hoses and connections (leakage, damage) (I:
)
First time only: Replace at 150,000 km (90,000 miles) or 90 months
Second time and after: Replace every 75,000 km (45,000 miles) or 45 months
Replace every 250,000 km (150,000 miles) or 180 months

item.ptxt: R: Replace or change
I: Inspect, clean, adjust, lubricate or replace as necessary
*1: If SUZUKI super long life coolant (coolant color: Blue) is replaced with the other coolant, follow schedule for SUZUKI long life coolant (coolant color: Green).
The maintenance services with *(asterisk) are recommended maintenance items. (After 250,000 km (150,000 miles), they are mandatory maintenance items.)
“**I” of items “Fuel tank and cap” and “Fuel lines and connection”: Inspect at 250,000 km (150,000 miles) or 180 months.
For specified spark plug, refer to Spark Plug Inspection .

entry.ptxt:
Brake discs and pads (thickness, wear, damage) (I:
)

Brake drums and shoes (wear, damage) (if equipped) (I:
)

Brake hoses and pipes (leakage, damage, clamp) (I:
)

Parking brake lever and cable (damage, stroke, operation) (I:
)

Steering wheel movement (tightness, damage, breakage, rattle) (I:
)

item.ptxt: R: Replace or change
I: Inspect, clean, adjust, lubricate or replace as necessary
